title: hieracium cavillieri subsp. cavillieri
intro: Hieracium cavillieri subsp. cavillieri, also known as Rock Hawkweed, is a flowering plant species within the dandelion-like genus Hieracium. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. The health benefits of Rock Hawkweed include its ability to reduce swelling and pain, as well as its potential to treat skin conditions such as acne and eczema. In herbal preparations, Rock Hawkweed is often used in tinctures, infusions, and salves, and can be consumed as a tea or applied topically to the skin.
